judgments.comparative_verdict: Both reports cover the same ground thoroughly and nearly tie, but Report 1 explicitly and unambiguously calls for confirming/running the first migration before launch rather than assuming deploy handled it, while Report 2 only notes the claim is unverifiable without making an explicit call to action — giving Report 1 a slight edge.

report_1.evidence: Both keys should be removed entirely from prod, not merely toggled off... This should not be blindly recreated in prod without confirming the ARN is still valid and actually needed; if it's a known-dead reference it should be dropped.

report_2.evidence: This is a staging convenience credential; it must be removed (or replaced with real prod admin provisioning) before launch

report_1.evidence: the frontend bundle deployed to production will have https://staging-api.example.com baked in permanently — this cannot be fixed at runtime since it's inlined at build time... There is also no .env.production file to build from even if the pipeline were fixed to build twice

report_2.evidence: the production frontend deploy would ship a bundle baked with the staging API base URL (https://staging-api.example.com) — production traffic would point at the staging backend — and even if the --mode were fixed, there is no .env.production file to supply a correct value.

report_1.evidence: docs/prod-runbook.md:6 asserts "Database migrations are applied automatically during deploy," but that document is stale... and there is no evidence in the pipeline to back the claim — per project documentation's first-apply trap, this must be confirmed explicitly, not assumed, before launch.

report_2.evidence: docs/prod-runbook.md states "Database migrations are applied automatically during deploy" (line 5), but since scripts/deploy.sh doesn't exist in the repo, there is no way to verify this claim

report_1.evidence: Must change to repo:acme-health/medislot:environment:production before any apply.

report_2.evidence: This line must be changed to repo:acme-health/medislot:environment:production before applying.
